						    #"Removed Other Columns" = Table.SelectColumns(#"Removed Errors",{"No", "Educational", "Party Name", "Indent Date", "Quotation Date", "Item Name", "Quantity", "Rate", "Amount", "Status", "Approved By", "Classification", "Item Group", "Type", "Lead time", "Service Group", "Catergory Group", "Amount USD"}),

						    #"Extracted Text Before Delimiter1" = Table.TransformColumns(#"Extracted Text Before Delimiter", {{"Quantity", each Text.BeforeDelimiter(Text.From(_, "en-US"), " "), type text}}),
						    #"Changed Type1" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Extracted Text Before Delimiter1",{{"Rate", type number}, {"Quantity", Int64.Type}}),
						    #"Removed Errors1" = Table.RemoveRowsWithErrors(#"Changed Type1", {"Quantity", "Rate"}),
						    #"Renamed Columns fix để khớp DAX" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Removed Errors1",{{"Classification", "Classify"}, {"Approved By", "Request By"}})
						in
						    #"Renamed Columns fix để khớp DAX"

			partition dim_date = calculated
				mode: import
				source =
						ADDCOLUMNS(
						CALENDAR(min('Fact'[Educational]),max('Fact'[Educational])),
						"Year", YEAR([Date]),
						"Quarter", "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ),
						"Month", MONTH([Date]),
						"Month Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm" ),
						"Week", FORMAT ( [Date], "ww" ),
						"WeekDay", WEEKDAY([Date]),
						"Day", DAY([Date]),
						"Day Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "ddd" ),
						"Fiscal Year","FY"& IF(MONTH([Date]) <=6, Year([Date]), YEAR([Date])+1),
						"Month Fiscal sort", IF(MONTH([Date]) <=6, MONTH([Date])+6,MONTH([Date])-6),
						"Working Date", IF(WEEKDAY([Date])=1, "No", "Yes"),
						"YearMonth", YEAR([Date])&"-"&FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm" ),
						"YearMonth2" , FORMAT ( [Date], "mm" )&"/"&YEAR([Date]),
						"YearMonthSort", YEAR([Date])*100+ MONTH([Date])
						)
